articles.title: Shaquille O’Neal had no clue who Celtics guard Baylor Scheierman is
articles.description:
"Scheierman?Who he play for?" O'Neal asked.

The post Shaquille O’Neal had no clue who Celtics guard Baylor Scheierman is appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Shaquille O'Neal questioned who Celtics guard Baylor Scheierman is during a recent interview.
O'Neal's comments highlight the lack of recognition for emerging players like Scheierman.
This incident may affect local fan perceptions of the Celtics' roster depth.

articles.title: The allure of ‘slop bowls’ fades as consumers tighten spending
articles.description:
Sales and traffic at restaurant chains like Cava, Chipotle and Sweetgreen are falling, as customers grow tired of both salad bowls and their rising price tags.

The post The allure of ‘slop bowls’ fades as consumers tighten spending appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sales at popular chains like Cava and Chipotle are declining as consumers cut back.
Boston residents are experiencing rising prices for salad bowls, affecting dining choices.
Decreased traffic at these restaurants may lead to reduced local job opportunities.

articles.title: Healey calls on aviation company operating at Hanscom to cut ties with ICE
articles.description:
Signature Aviation is a crucial partner for ICE as it flies immigrants into and out of Hanscom Field in Bedford, according to Gov. Maura Healey.

The post Healey calls on aviation company operating at Hanscom to cut ties with ICE appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Gov. Maura Healey urges Signature Aviation to end its partnership with ICE.
Signature Aviation facilitates flights for immigrants at Hanscom Field in Bedford.
Local residents may see changes in immigration enforcement practices at the airport.

articles.title: Prosecutors to drop domestic assault charge against Patriots’ Christian Barmore
articles.description:
Bristol County District Attorney Thomas M. Quinn III told reporters that the woman who made the complaint did not want to travel out of state for the case.

The post Prosecutors to drop domestic assault charge against Patriots’ Christian Barmore appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Prosecutors will drop the domestic assault charge against Patriots' Christian Barmore.
Bristol County DA Thomas M. Quinn III confirmed the woman's reluctance to travel for the case.
This decision may affect Barmore's standing with the Patriots and local fan support.
